1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Daglig leder</h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Her finner du oss</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Post- og besøksadresse </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="off-canvas-7cbfe4c" aria-expanded="false" class="elementor-icon" href="#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Doff_canvas%3Atoggle%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjdjYmZlNGMiLCJkaXNwbGF5TW9kZSI6InRvZ2dsZ
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-controls="off-canvas-7cbfe4c" aria-expanded="false" class="elementor-icon" href="#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Doff_canvas%3Aclose%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjdjYmZlNGMiLCJkaXNwbGF5TW9kZSI6ImNsb3NlIn
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="mailto:giv@giv.no" target="_blank"><u>giv@giv.no</u></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="glass" placeholder="Search for address" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input accept="audio/mp3,audio/mpeg3,audio/wav,audio/mp4,audio/mpeg,audio/x-m4a" id="oum_location_audio" multiple="false" name="oum_location_audio" type="file"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'oum_location_address' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="oum_location_address" name="oum_location_address" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='street-address' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div id="close-location-fullscreen" onclick="oumMap.closePopup()">✕</div>
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5>Vinter 2026</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5

MODERATE

<h5>Betalingsalternativer</h5>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Kongsvinger</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5><strong>GIV IKS mottar og innhenter opplysninger om våre deltakere for å kunne gi riktige tjenester på vegne av våre eierkommuner.</strong></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5

MODERATE

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Skoleruta Innlandet</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5>Vinter 2026</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Betalingsalternativer</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="jet-search__field" name="s" placeholder="Søk her …" type="search" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

SVG is missing accessible name (×30 across article pages)

<svg class="e-font-icon-svg e-eicon-menu-bar" viewbox="0 0 1000 1000" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M104 333H896C929 333 958 304 958 271S929 208 896 208H104C71 208 42 237 42 271S71 333 1
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading (×2 across article pages)

<body class="wp-singular aktuelt-template-default single single-aktuelt postid-3915 wp-theme-hello-elementor elementor-default elementor-kit-4 elementor-page-2494 e--ua-isTouchDevice" data-elementor-d
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1 (×2 across article pages)

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Tilbud ved GIV </h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4 (×2 across article pages)

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Skoleruta Innlandet</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6 (×2 across article pages)

<h6 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">2025 © GIV | </h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark (×2 across article pages)

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
